fcnet 0.2.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Data Loading

load_matrices()
Load connectivity matrices from MATLAB file

ROI Organization

get_indices()
Get ROI indices organized by network

Connectivity Computation

calc_within()
Calculate within-network connectivity
calc_between()
Calculate between-network connectivity
calc_conn()
Calculate user-defined connectivity

Visualization

plot_heatmap()
Plot connectivity matrix heatmap
plot_compare()
Plot group comparison bar chart
plot_scatter()
Plot connectivity-behavior scatter

Example Data

ex_conn_array
Example Connectivity Array
ex_roi_names
Example ROI Names from Schaefer Atlas
ex_indices
Example Network Indices
